subject: fix: medium and low-priority audit fixes (M1-M16, L1-L6)
body:
Medium fixes:
- M1: Add 30s fetch timeout via AbortController; user-friendly timeout
  error message instead of indefinite hang
- M3: Cache tag style objects in module-level Map to avoid creating
  500+ new objects per render cycle
- M5: Replace duplicate work hours logic in useHealthData with
  getWorkPattern() from utils.js for consistency
- M10: Add network status and theme to debug pill diagnostics
- M12: Wrap UrgencyBar and ImpactBar in React.memo (pure presentational)
- M14: Validate ?bg= param against hex regex to prevent CSS injection
- M15: Remove token source name from extract-api.js log output
- M16: Replace aria-hidden="true" with role="presentation" on backdrop
  overlays (DetailPane, SettingsPane, FilterSidebar, QuickGuide)

Low fixes:
- L1: Add vertical clamping to heatmap tooltip (was only horizontal)
- L2: Increase loading timeout from 10s to 20s for slow networks
- L6: Add explanatory comment for ISO week calculation magic number

Tags: performance, security, a11y, debug, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-fixes
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01TTPDz1J9eg8GxxJHYf5DXG
title: medium and low-priority audit fixes (M1-M16, L1-L6)
